AI Text Messaging

Instant AI Text Messaging That Replies to Customers Automatically

Automate text replies, confirmations, and reminders. Sophiie keeps the conversation going, so you don't have to.

Learn More

Meet Sophiie, Your Text-Savvy Sidekick

Managing customer texts doesn't have to be a hassle. Sophiie simplifies the process, letting you handle all your messages in one place while using AI to help you craft perfect responses.

What Can Sophiie Do for Your Texts?

Write Smarter, Not Harder

Use Sophiie's AI to draft professional, friendly, or casual replies tailored to your brand and customer needs.

Keep Everything in One Place

Manage all your text conversations directly from your Sophiie dashboard—no need to jump between devices or apps.

Save Time with Suggestions

Sophiie's AI suggests responses based on the conversation, making it easy for you to reply faster.

Customised Messaging

Add your personal touch to AI-drafted texts to ensure every reply feels authentic and on-brand.

Ready to Meet Sophiie?

Meet your AI Office Manager—designed to keep your business running smoothly while you stay focused on the big picture. From managing enquiries and bookings to keeping your team and customers in sync, Sophiie does it all.

Learn More

Why Choose Sophiie for Your Text Management?

Centralised Messaging

Keep all customer texts organised in one place for easy management.

Professional Replies, Every Time

Use AI to help you create polished, thoughtful responses with minimal effort.

Flexible and Adaptable

Whether it's a quick update or a detailed explanation, Sophiie helps you get it just right.

Better Customer Experience

Quick, clear communication keeps customers happy and engaged.

Explore More Smart Solutions

Discover additional tools that work seamlessly with Sophiie to elevate your customer communication experience.

Frequently asked questions

Find quick answers to common questions about Sophiie's AI text messaging.

Sophiie connects to your business phone number and automatically handles incoming text messages, drafting replies based on your preferences and knowledge base.
Yes. You can manage all text conversations directly from the Sophiie dashboard without switching between apps.
Yes. Sophiie's AI suggests contextually appropriate replies that you can send with one tap or customise first.
Yes. Sophiie can auto-reply to common queries, send confirmations, and follow up with customers automatically.
Absolutely. Sophiie sends automated booking confirmations and reminders via text to reduce no-shows.
Yes. You can send bulk texts to customer groups for announcements, promotions, or updates.

Ready to Simplify Your Texting?

Discover how Sophiie's AI Text Responder can revolutionise the way you handle customer communication. Centralised, efficient, and always on point!
